content.full_text:
July 16, 2002

Alfred G. Vazquez
560 Glenn Drive
Susanville, CA 96130-3623

Re: Your Request for Advice
    Our File No. W-02-164

Dear Mr. Vazquez:

Pursuant to our telephone conversation of July 13, 2002, this letter is to confirm that you have withdrawn your letter seeking advice regarding the conflict-of-interest provisions of the Political Reform Act.

If you have any additional questions, please feel free to call our office toll-free at (866) 275-3772.

Sincerely,

Luisa Menchaca
General Counsel

By: [signature]
Natalie Bocanegra
Staff Counsel, Legal Division
